title: A Close Curly Brace Should Be Located at The Beginning of a Line
description: Enforces a shared coding convention where a close curly brace is placed at the beginning of a line. This allows for efficient team collaboration and code readability.
impact: Improves code readability and consistency, making the codebase easier to navigate and understand.

checks.message: Close curly brace should be located at the beginning of a line
